name: Divots Golf Lounge
about: Divots Golf Lounge is an 8,000 sqft climate-controlled indoor golf and sports entertainment facility in Jonesboro, AR. It features six simulator bays powered by TruGolf Apogee technology with E6 Connect software, a tour-quality ProPutt Systems putting surface, and chipping mats for short game practice. Three bays offer multisport capabilities for basketball, football, baseball, soccer, and more. The venue operates on a bay rental basis, offering hourly rates for open play and private event packages. It is designed for both serious golf practice and casual group entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: TruGolf Apogee technology provides slow-motion replay and detailed ball/club data for rapid improvement
Multisport options allow for diverse entertainment beyond traditional golf
Tour-quality putting green and chipping mats offer comprehensive short game practice

food_and_drink.notes: No food service; catering must be arranged separately. Dippin Dots available for purchase.

simulator_hardware.notes: Camera-based launch monitor with slow-motion replay and detailed shot data

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Rental clubs are available at no additional cost for private events and regular play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or alcohol service is available. Catering must be arranged separately. Dippin Dots are available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes varies depending on the simulator software and number of players, but typical rounds take 1.5-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Divots is suitable for children with multisport activities and birthday party packages available. Members under 18 require a signed waiver.
